column2: dtm <- dtm[ntoken(dtm) > 0, ]
poliblogPrevFit <- stm(
documents = dtm, # input. can be a quanteda `dfm` or produced with stm's `prepdocuments`
data = docvars(dtm), # provide the meta data
K = 69, # number of topics chosen; we will discuss model choice in greater detail in the last session.
prevalence =~   status + city + support , # attributes used as covariates (X_d)
max.em.its = 100, # maximum number of iterations; here, after 75 iterations with no satisfying result, the stm stops
seed = 4023330, # set seed; this specific seed is used to mirror results in vignette; only necessary if "spectral" is *not* used below

init.type = "Spectral", # highly recommended. Provides consistent results based on the method of moments, which is deterministic and globally consistent. This means that no matter the seed that is set, the same results will be generated (with slight differences explained in footnote 10 of the vignette).
verbose = T) # turns on/off  whether information should be printed to the screen
